creator: hywel@hmallett.co.uk
text:
When trying to make reinstall cups, I get the following error:

/bin/sh /usr/ports/print/cups-base/pkg-install placeholder POST-INSTALL
cups:*:193:
You already have a group "cups", so I will use it.
pw: user 'cups' already exists
Adding user "cups" failed...
*** Error code 1

How-To-Repeat: Make reinstall
